root.description: A map of tags to add to all resources
root.name: tags

root.description: The alias of the prometheus workspace. See more in the [AWS Docs](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-onboard-create-workspace.html)
root.name: workspace_alias

root.description: The logging configuration of the prometheus workspace.
root.name: logging_configuration

root.description: Configuration block for setting limits on metrics with specific label sets
root.name: limits_per_label_set

root.description: If a KMS Key ARN is set, this key will be used to encrypt the corresponding log group. Please be sure that the KMS Key has an appropriate key policy (https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/logs/encrypt-log-data-kms.html)
root.name: cloudwatch_log_group_kms_key_id

root.description: Controls whether an Alert Manager definition is created along with the AMP workspace
root.name: create_alert_manager

root.description: Determines whether a resources will be created
root.name: create

root.description: Custom name of CloudWatch log group for a service associated with the container definition
root.name: cloudwatch_log_group_name

root.description: The alert manager definition that you want to be applied. See more in the [AWS Docs](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/prometheus/latest/userguide/AMP-alert-manager.html)
root.name: alert_manager_definition

root.description: The ID of an existing workspace to use when `create_workspace` is `false`
root.name: workspace_id

root.description: The ARN of the KMS Key to for encryption at rest
root.name: kms_key_arn

root.description: Number of days to retain metric data in the workspace
root.name: retention_period_in_days

root.description: Controls whether a resource policy is created along with the AMP workspace
root.name: create_resource_policy

root.description: Determines whether the log group name should be used as a prefix
root.name: cloudwatch_log_group_use_name_prefix

root.description: Specified the log class of the log group. Possible values are: `STANDARD` or `INFREQUENT_ACCESS`
root.name: cloudwatch_log_group_class

root.description: Number of days to retain log events. Set to `0` to keep logs indefinitely
root.name: cloudwatch_log_group_retention_in_days

root.description: A map of one or more rule group namespace definitions
root.name: rule_group_namespaces

root.description: Region where the resource(s) will be managed. Defaults to the Region set in the provider configuration
root.name: region

root.description: Determines whether a workspace will be created or to use an existing workspace
root.name: create_workspace

root.description: A map of IAM policy [statements](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/data-sources/iam_policy_document#statement) for custom permission usage
root.name: resource_policy_statements

root.description: Prometheus endpoint available for this workspace
root.name: workspace_prometheus_endpoint

root.description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workspace
root.name: workspace_arn

root.description: Identifier of the workspace
root.name: workspace_id
